description: Final 2-panel provenance figure: evolutionary tree and GO curation decision summary
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 8))

# Panel A: Evolutionary tree showing when SHG→SHS occurred
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_title("A. Evolutionary Timing of CASP12 SHG→SHS Mutation", fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_xlim(-2, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.5, 6.5)
ax1.axis('off')

# Simple cladogram
tree_lines = [
    ([1, 1], [0.5, 5.5], 'black', 2),
    ([1, 3], [1.0, 1.0], 'black', 1.5),
    ([3, 3], [1.0, 0.5], 'black', 1.5),
    ([3, 3], [1.0, 1.5], 'black', 1.5),
    ([1, 2], [4.0, 4.0], 'black', 1.5),
    ([2, 2], [4.0, 3.0], 'black', 1.5),
    ([2, 3], [4.0, 5.0], 'black', 1.5),
    ([3, 3], [5.0, 4.5], 'black', 1.5),
    ([3, 3], [5.0, 5.5], 'red', 2.5),
]

for xs, ys, color, lw in tree_lines:
    ax1.plot(xs, ys, color=color, linewidth=lw)

species_labels = [
    (3.2, 0.5, "Rat (Q920D5)", "SHG ✓", "green", "420 aa"),
    (3.2, 1.5, "Mouse (O08736)", "SHG ✓", "green", "419 aa"),
    (2.2, 3.0, "Macaque (Q153Z0)", "SHG ✓", "green", "421 aa"),
    (3.2, 4.5, "Chimp (A0A2J8LBR9)", "SHG ✓", "green", "341 aa"),
    (3.2, 5.5, "HUMAN (Q6UXS9)", "SHS ✗", "red", "341 aa"),
]

for x, y, name, shg, color, length in species_labels:
    weight = 'bold' if 'HUMAN' in name else 'normal'
    ax1.text(x, y, f"{name}", fontsize=9, va='center', fontweight=weight, 
             color='black' if 'HUMAN' not in name else 'red')
    bbox = dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor='#C8E6C9' if color=='green' else '#FFCDD2',
                edgecolor=color, linewidth=1.5)
    ax1.text(x+4.2, y, shg, fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', va='center', color=color, bbox=bbox)
    ax1.text(x+5.8, y, length, fontsize=8, va='center', color='gray')

ax1.annotate('SHG→SHS\nmutation\n(human-specific\n< 6-7 MYA)',
            xy=(3, 5.25), xytext=(5.5, 6.2),
            fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='red', ha='center',
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=2),
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#FFCDD2', edgecolor='red'))

ax1.text(0, -0.3, "~80 MYA", fontsize=8, ha='center', color='gray')
ax1.text(3, -0.3, "Present", fontsize=8, ha='center', color='gray')
ax1.annotate('', xy=(3, -0.1), xytext=(0, -0.1),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray', lw=1))

# Panel B: GO Decision Table
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title("B. GO:0004197 Curation Decision Summary", fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax2.axis('off')

table_data = [
    ["Evidence Type", "Finding", "Direction", "Weight"],
    ["SHG box mutation", "Gly173→Ser (human-only)", "REFUTES", "★★★★★"],
    ["Stop codon", "Trunc at pos 125 (most)", "REFUTES", "★★★★★"],
    ["Biochemical (rat)", "No substrates cleavable", "REFUTES", "★★★★☆"],
    ["UniProt name", "\"Inactive caspase-12\"", "REFUTES", "★★★★☆"],
    ["IKR annotation", "NOT|enables GO:0004197", "REFUTES", "★★★★★"],
    ["Autoprocess site", "ATAD→ASAD (lost)", "REFUTES", "★★★☆☆"],
    ["C299A mutant", "Non-catalytic role proven", "REFUTES", "★★★★☆"],
    ["AlphaFold", "Ser173 adds steric bulk", "QUALIFIES", "★★★☆☆"],
    ["Evolution", "Chimp retains SHG", "REFUTES", "★★★★☆"],
    ["QACRG motif", "Conserved (full-length)", "Supports", "★☆☆☆☆"],
    ["", "", "", ""],
    ["VERDICT", "OVER-ANNOTATED", "Remove IBA", ""],
]

y_start = 0.95
for i, row in enumerate(table_data):
    y = y_start - i * 0.072
    is_header = i == 0
    is_verdict = i == len(table_data) - 1
    
    for j, (val, x_pos) in enumerate(zip(row, [0.0, 0.28, 0.62, 0.82])):
        if is_header:
            ax2.text(x_pos, y, val, fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', transform=ax2.transAxes, 
                    va='center', color='darkblue')
        elif is_verdict and val:
            ax2.text(x_pos, y, val, fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', transform=ax2.transAxes,
                    va='center', color='purple',
                    bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#E1BEE7', edgecolor='purple'))
        elif j == 2 and val and not is_header:
            bg = '#FFCDD2' if val == 'REFUTES' else ('#FFF9C4' if val == 'QUALIFIES' else '#C8E6C9')
            fc = 'darkred' if val == 'REFUTES' else ('darkorange' if val == 'QUALIFIES' else 'darkgreen')
            ax2.text(x_pos, y, val, fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', transform=ax2.transAxes,
                    va='center', color=fc,
                    bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.2', facecolor=bg, edgecolor='gray'))
        else:
            ax2.text(x_pos, y, val, fontsize=8, transform=ax2.transAxes, va='center')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('casp12_final_provenance.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final provenance figure saved")
